root.m_Talk_ENG: I chose to forget my past.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I chose to forget my past.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I chose to forget my past.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing I know for certain is that it was my choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing I know for certain is that it was my choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing I know for certain is that it was my choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then it reached you, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then it reached you, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then it reached you, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me there's Ink Rain in the past too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me there's Ink Rain in the past too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me there's Ink Rain in the past too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Signature waveforms detected. The Tiger's heading your way sooner than planned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Signature waveforms detected. The Tiger's heading your way sooner than planned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Signature waveforms detected. The Tiger's heading your way sooner than planned.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh
8v? Why's she drawing her sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh
8v? Why's she drawing her sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh
8v? Why's she drawing her sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The past is gone. It can't be reclaimed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The past is gone. It can't be reclaimed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The past is gone. It can't be reclaimed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So don't ever think of coming back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So don't ever think of coming back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So don't ever think of coming back.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I thought we got sliced in half, but
8v we're back?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I thought we got sliced in half, but
8v we're back?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I thought we got sliced in half, but
8v we're back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sword wasn't meant to cut us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sword wasn't meant to cut us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sword wasn't meant to cut us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment I felt it, it was like falling through that well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment I felt it, it was like falling through that well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment I felt it, it was like falling through that well.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That woman's sword
8v Does it hold some special power?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That woman's sword
8v Does it hold some special power?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That woman's sword
8v Does it hold some special power?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did we really just travel to the past?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did we really just travel to the past?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did we really just travel to the past?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the device worked as intended, then yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the device worked as intended, then yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the device worked as intended, then yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We still have enough Eternium. Next time the Ink Rain falls, we'll test it again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We still have enough Eternium. Next time the Ink Rain falls, we'll test it again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We still have enough Eternium. Next time the Ink Rain falls, we'll test it again.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
To see if what we saw was truly the past
8v or just a hallucination.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
To see if what we saw was truly the past
8v or just a hallucination.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
To see if what we saw was truly the past
